name: Sunny Splits Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Sunchokes (Jerusalem Artichokes), cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the split peas and lentils.
2. Soak the beans in 6 cups of water for up to 8 hours.
3. Using the same soaking water, bring the beans to a boil and skim off any foam that accumulates.
4. Add caraway seeds, onion, celery, and carrots. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 40 minutes.
5. Add the sunchoke chunks and salt and pepper to taste. Simmer an additional 10 minutes until the sunchokes are crisp-tender.
(Note: This recipe is from the March/April issue of "The Whole Story," a publication of Whole Foods Market.)
